title: DNA Extraction from Modern Dental Calculus
author: Franziska Aron
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7p8hmrw
materials: Gently shake C4 Solution to mix

Retrieve the spin filter columns (provided in the kit) from fridge to warm them up to Room temperature for use at step 26 "provided in the kit" refers to: DNeasy PowerSoil Kit (100) Cat No./ID: 12888-100 A spin filter column is a spin filter unit sitting in a collection column. The spin filter unit contains the membrane.

steps.title: Weigh out 3 mg to 5...
steps.instruction: Weigh out 3 mg to 5 mg of the calculus and transfer it into a 2ml-Eppendorf Safe-Lock DNA LoBind-Tube (use special accuracy scales)

steps.title: Crush the calculus with a sterile...
steps.instruction: Crush the calculus with a sterile metal pestle within the tube.

steps.title: Add 250 µL 0
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL 0.5 Molarity (M) EDTA and 12.5 µL Proteinase K ( 10 mg, /ml )

steps.title: Let it rotate in the dark...
steps.instruction: Let it rotate in the dark at Room temperature for 24:00:00, up to 48h (optional: over the weekend) until the calculus fully decalcifies and either disappears or becomes buoyant (floating and feathery in appearance)

steps.title: Remove the tubes from the rotator...
steps.instruction: Remove the tubes from the rotator and briefly centrifuge the extraction tubes This centrifugation step is just made to remove the liquid from the lid.

steps.title: Transfer everything with a 1000 µL...
steps.instruction: Transfer everything with a 1000 µL pipette tip (supernatant and pellet) to the Power Bead tubes

steps.title: Add 60 µL C1 solution, invert several times to mix
steps.instruction: Add 60 µL C1 solution, invert several times to mix.

steps.title: Secure tubes horizontally on a flat-bed...
steps.instruction: Secure tubes horizontally on a flat-bed vortex pad with tape, vortex at maximum speed for 00:10:00

steps.title: Centrifuge at 9400 x g, °C...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 9400 x g, °C for 00:00:30 at Room temperature Make sure the Power Bead tubes can rotate without rubbing, 10.000 x g is the maximum, otherwise the tubes may break

steps.title: Transfer supernatant to the 2ml collection...
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant to the 2ml collection tube (provided in the kit) Expect 400 µL to 500 µL

steps.title: Add 250 µL C2 Solution to...
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL C2 Solution to the supernatant and vortex 00:00:05 at maximum speed

steps.title: Incubate at 4 °C for 00:05:00...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 4 °C for 00:05:00 on the pre-cooled rack ( 4 °C )

steps.title: Centrifuge 9400 x g, °C for 00:01:00 at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 9400 x g, °C for 00:01:00 at Room temperature

steps.title: Transfer 600 µL of the supernatant...
steps.instruction: Transfer 600 µL of the supernatant to a clean 2ml collection tube (provided in the kit), avoid transferring the pellet.

steps.title: Add 200 µL C3 solution and vortex briefly
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL C3 solution and vortex briefly

steps.title: Incubate the tubes at 4 °C...
steps.instruction: Incubate the tubes at 4 °C for 00:05:00 on the pre-cooled rack ( 4 °C )

steps.title: Centrifuge the tubes at 9400 x...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the tubes at 9400 x g, °C for 00:01:00 at Room temperature

steps.title: Transfer 750 µL of the supernatant...
steps.instruction: Transfer 750 µL of the supernatant to a clean 2ml collection tube (provided in the kit)

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.2 mL C4 Solution to supernatant and vortex for 00:00:05 The solution should not exceed the rim of the tube.

steps.title: Bind the DNA on the membrane of spin filter unit:
steps.instruction: Bind the DNA on the membrane of spin filter unit:

steps.title: Repeat until the entire solution has...
steps.instruction: Repeat until the entire solution has been passed through the spin filter unit (2-3 times) go to step #30.1

steps.title: Load 500 µL C5 Solution into spin filter unit
steps.instruction: Load 500 µL C5 Solution into spin filter unit

steps.title: Centrifuge 00:01:00 9400 x g, °C at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 00:01:00 9400 x g, °C at Room temperature

steps.title: Dry spin 00:01:00 9400 x g, °C at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Dry spin 00:01:00 9400 x g, °C at Room temperature

steps.title: Place the spin filter unit into...
steps.instruction: Place the spin filter unit into a clean 2ml collection tube (provided in the kit)

steps.title: Pipette 100 µL C6 Solution into...
steps.instruction: Pipette 100 µL C6 Solution into center of the membrane in the spin filter unit and incubate for 00:01:00

steps.title: Centrifuge 9400 x g, °C for 00:00:30 at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 9400 x g, °C for 00:00:30 at Room temperature

steps.title: Remove spin filter unit and quantify...
steps.instruction: Remove spin filter unit and quantify the DNA ( 3 µL ) with the Qubit ds BR Kit

steps.title: Centrifuge for 00:01:00 9400 x g, °C at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 00:01:00 9400 x g, °C at Room temperature

steps.title: Remove supernatant Optional
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant Optional: Transfer the supernatant to a clean 1.5ml loBind Tube and stored it for future analysis at -20 °C

steps.title: Note this step is optional, however...
steps.instruction: Note this step is optional, however it can be useful to remove exogenous fluids such as blood. Add 1 mL of 0.5 Molarity (M) EDTA and let it rotate on a tube rotator for 00:15:00 at Room temperature

steps.title: Clean the metal pestle after every...
steps.instruction: Clean the metal pestle after every sample by incubating for 00:02:00 in a household bleach dilution , then wiping clean with HPLC-water and drying with a clean paper towel go to step #8 Sterile plastic pestles can be used instead of metal pestles, but they must be changed between each sample and not re-used.

steps.title: Save power bead tubes at -20 °C as backup
steps.instruction: Save power bead tubes at -20 °C as backup. These can be thrown out once you know the extraction worked

steps.title: Store remaining supernatant at -20 °C...
steps.instruction: Store remaining supernatant at -20 °C We save this as backup until confirmation that the extraction worked. If extraction was successful, this can be discarded.

steps.title: Load approximately 675 µL into spin filter unit
steps.instruction: Load approximately 675 µL into spin filter unit

steps.title: Centrifuge 00:01:00 at 9400 x g, °C at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 00:01:00 at 9400 x g, °C at Room temperature

steps.title: Store the eluate at -20 °C
steps.instruction: Store the eluate at -20 °C

steps.title: Place a 1
steps.instruction: Place a 1.5ml/2ml tube rack at 4 °C for the incubation steps on the final days

steps.title: Prepare a 1:10 dilution of household...
steps.instruction: Prepare a 1:10 dilution of household bleach solution (~6% hypochlorite) in a 50ml-Falcon tube

steps.title: Label for each sample one 2ml-Eppendorf...
steps.instruction: Label for each sample one 2ml-Eppendorf Safe-Lock DNA LoBind-Tube and one 1.5ml-Eppendorf Safe-Lock DNA LoBind-Tube

steps.title: Label for each sample one Power...
steps.instruction: Label for each sample one Power Bead tube, one spin filter column and three 2ml collection tubes (all provided in the kit)
